title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LUMBANGAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NASUGBU, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO NASUGBU EAST CENTRAL SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 2261 / 65 OG No. 9, 2070 (March 3, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5019, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LUMBANGAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NASUGBU, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO NASUGBU EAST CENTRAL SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Lumbangan Elementary School in the Municipality of Nasugbu, Province of Batangas, is hereby changed to Nasugbu East Central School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
